## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test` (or `npm run test:node`)
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual test performed (describe below)

### Manual test notes

<!-- commands, channels tested, expected/actual behavior -->

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated (README/docs/*) when behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets/tokens committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
